jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Myntra - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Myntra. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Madurai-based team.

About Myntra:
Myntra is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Myntra!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
